sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35773" key="e)nnea/gwnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐννεά-γωνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, of a class of figurate numbers, <sense id="n35773.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">enneagonal,</tr_> Theo Sm.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.40H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
